creator: cvs-src@yandex.ru
text:
Development of this library is stopped. Last release was on Jan 22 2002. Author discourages to use it. From offsite (http://sovereignit.com/Vmaps/): 

"""
ANTIQUATED and UNSUPPORTED; you're almost certainly better off using NumPy now.
"""

Port is unmaintained and nobody in the tree depends on it. So i think it's safe to deprecate it and remove with suggesting user to use math/py-numpy instead.
